descriptions.text: Marionette is a game which was worked on to be released for the Nintendo 64 and later for the GameCube, but ended up being cancelled. It was supposed to make the player control puppets. It was never shown publicly.

A marionette ( MARR-ee-ə-NET; French: marionnette [maʁjɔnɛt] ), or string puppet, is a puppet controlled from above using wires or strings depending on regional variations.  A marionette's puppeteer is called a marionettist. Marionettes are operated with the puppeteer hidden or revealed to an audience by using a vertical or horizontal control bar in different forms of theatres or entertainment venues. They have also been used in films and on television. The attachment of the strings varies according to its character or purpose.
